title: Tandoor Beans and Broad
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegetarian dish made with tandoor-spiced broad beans and cozy vegetables.

ingredients.name: cozy
ingredients.notes: any type of cozy vegetable works well

ingredients.name: tandoor spice blend
ingredients.notes: make sure to use a spice blend specifically intended for tandoor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the tandoor spice blend and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the broad beans and cozy vegetables and sauté for 3-4 minutes.
Add the water and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the broad beans are tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
